prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约1300→1271→3459→2099→1873名。2023年出现明显断档（3459名），2024年迅速回升至2099名，2025年进一步回升至1873名，近两年呈持续回暖趋势，2025年基准约1873名；该校在贵州省理科组招生计划：2021年90人、2022年90人、2023年99人、2024年96人、2025年92人；2026年物理类计划大幅扩招至143人，较2025年增加51人（+55.4%），扩招幅度显著，将明显缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2024年位列全国第8名，2025–2026年位列第9名，稳居全国Top10顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，食堂全国排名第一、新闻传播学科排名稳居前列，无负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第22位（较热），在985高校中处于中等偏上水平，短视频曝光以宿舍条件、开学典礼等正面内容为主，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达17个，其中A+学科3个（光学工程、机械工程、电气工程），A学科6个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、物理学、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术），A-学科8个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、新闻传播学、生物医学工程、生物学），学科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、自动化类、临床医学等工科和医学类专业持续高热；贵州省2026年高考总报名人数约299,000人，较2025年（约297,258人）略有增加，按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算，2026年物理类考生约208,400人，竞争基数小幅上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1873名、2026年大幅扩招55.4%（从92人增至143人）这一最大影响因素，以及学校声誉偏正面、学科实力极强、抖音热度较高等吸引竞争的因素，扩招效应显著占优，预计最低位次较2025年后移约573名；预测2026年理科最低位次约2446名，区间2167–2725名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 1300 → 1271 → 3459 → 2099 → 1873. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (3459), quickly recovered to 2099 in 2024, and further improved to 1873 in 2025, showing a continuous recovery trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 1873 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science in Guizhou Province: 90 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 99 in 2023, 96 in 2024, 92 in 2025. In 2026, the physics category plan expands significantly to 143, an increase of 51 (+55.4%) compared to 2025, which will notably alleviate competition pressure and push the lowest ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 8th nationally in the Shanghai Ranking from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025-2026, firmly among the top 10 top universities in China. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly positive: canteens ranked first nationally, journalism and communication discipline consistently ranks high, no negative public incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), at an upper-middle level among 985 universities, with short video exposure mainly featuring positive content such as dormitory conditions and opening ceremonies, attracting high application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 17 disciplines are rated A- or above, including 3 A+ disciplines (Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 6 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology), and 8 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, Biology), demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering, automation, clinical medicine and other engineering and medical majors remain highly popular. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 297,258). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 69.7%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 208,400, with a slight increase in competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1873, the significant 55.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 (from 92 to 143) as the biggest influencing factor, along with positive reputation, extremely strong disciplinary strength, and relatively high Douyin popularity attracting competition, the expansion effect dominates. It is estimated that the lowest ranking will shift backward by about 573 places compared to 2025. The predicted lowest ranking for science in 2026 is about 2446, with a range of 2167–2725.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2446, range 2167–2725. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (2167) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Computer Science, etc.); those around the middle (about 2446) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a sprint; those near the upper bound (2725) should mainly use Tier 3 as a safety, with Tier 2 as an attempt.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for the History Category is approximately 508 (only one year of data; previously Guizhou Province used the traditional liberal arts/science model, changed to History Category/Physics Category from 2024); the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Guizhou Province: 5 students in History Category in 2025; the plan for History Category in 2026 remains 5 students, unchanged from the previous year, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 9th nationally in the Soft Science ranking, top-tier university; reputation evaluation in 2026 is generally positive, with excellent cafeteria conditions and no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 22nd (relatively hot), overall application attention is high; advantageous disciplines in liberal arts include Journalism and Communication A-, Business Administration A-, Law (corresponding to first-level discipline Law, Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Law is A-), demonstrating strong strength in the liberal arts field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Law and Business Administration majors is stable; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guizhou Province is estimated at approximately 90,600 based on the recent proportion of about 30.3%, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (90,087), with a slightly rising competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 508, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, slight increase in total examinees, and positive reputation, the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly backward by about 15 places compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is approximately 523, with a range of 460–586.

- Law (National First-Class Undergraduate Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 523, range 460–586. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (460) can aim for the Law major; those with rankings in the middle or upper limit are advised to focus on Business Administration. Only 2 majors are available for liberal arts, offering limited choices; it is recommended to decide based on personal interests and career plans.
